student_metadata.name: Prince Sahoo
student_metadata.task: Task 2.3 — Result, Comparison and Reproducibility Checklist

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Writing the 3-5 sentence explanation for why our numbers differ from the paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me explain why our mAP on Olivetti Faces differs from the paper's AP on PASCAL VOC 2007. Our absolute values are higher but relative improvements are smaller.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped structure the explanation around three factors: dataset simplicity, lower K producing less sparsity, and simpler descriptors.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I verified each point: (a) Olivetti is indeed simpler (controlled setting), (b) K=16 vs K=256 reduces sparsity, (c) raw patches vs SIFT captures less structure.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Creating the ablation bar chart visualization.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Create a matplotlib bar chart comparing our mAP values with the paper's AP values across all 4 normalization configurations, with value labels on bars.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided matplotlib code for grouped bar chart. I modified colors, labels, and layout.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified the chart accurately represents the numerical results from Task 2.2.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Changed color scheme to use seaborn palette, adjusted bar width, added value annotations, and set proper axis limits.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are the exact 5 items needed for the reproducibility checklist in Task 2.3?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Listed the 5 items from the exam instructions. I then verified each one against our actual implementation.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Confirmed: random seeds set, requirements.txt has versions, notebooks run top-to-bottom, dataset auto-downloads, hyperparameters in one place.
